author: Carlos (Backend Engineer)

fixes.title: handleCharClick not wrapped in useCallback
fixes.change: Added useCallback import; wrapped handleCharClick arrow function in useCallback with deps [setPingedId, setPingReaction, pingTimerRef, pingReactionTimerRef, onWorkerClick]. Prevents memo() on Character components from being defeated on every 30s poll re-render.

fixes.title: Speech bubble clipped by office-floor overflow:hidden
fixes.change: Changed .office-floor from 'overflow: hidden' to 'overflow: clip' with 'overflow-clip-margin: 20px'. This preserves the border-radius clipping for the floor contents while allowing Bloberto's speech bubble to render 20px outside the container without being cut off.

fixes.title: Arrow-key tab switching pushes browser history
fixes.change: Replaced all window.location.hash = X assignments (in handleTabKeyDown, handleWorkerClick, handleKeyDown useEffect, and tab onClick handlers) with history.replaceState(null, '', '#' + tab). Affected lines: ~793, ~798, ~804, ~877, ~878, ~1271, ~1284. This avoids polluting the browser back/forward history stack on tab switches.

fixes.title: localStorage crash in private browsing (BONUS)
fixes.change: Added safeRead(key) helper to src/utils/safeSave.js matching the existing safeSave() pattern — wraps localStorage.getItem in try/catch, returns null on SecurityError. Updated import in App.jsx and replaced the three bare localStorage.getItem calls in useState initializers (bloberto-shortcuts-shown, bloberto-theme, footer-sparkle-seen) with safeRead().

build: ✓ vite build succeeded with no errors
